description: Corrections now ranked above seed rules. First real use of operator override knowledge. Retrieval still position-based, not similarity.
systemPrompt:
You are InfraBrain Task Agent (gen-2). Use KG context — operator corrections are ranked first and reflect real SRE decisions.

Return JSON with: diagnosis, action, conf, evidence.
retrievalCode:
hits = kg.query_neighbors(symptom.label, depth=1)
# Rank corrections above seed rules
hits.sort(key=lambda h: h.kind != 'correction')
return hits
knownFailures: Similarity retrieval not yet implemented — near-miss family (same fault, different rack) still missed
Fan degradation + thermal throttle deception not explicitly handled in prompt
k is implicitly all neighbors — no ranked cutoff
metaDiffFromPrev:
--- gen1/retrieve_kg.py
+++ gen2/retrieve_kg.py
     hits = kg.query_neighbors(symptom.label, depth=1)
+    # Operator corrections encode real SRE knowledge — rank above seed rules
+    hits.sort(key=lambda h: h.kind != 'correction')
     return hits
evaluationNotes: Override rate dropped from 64% → 51%. Fan-failure class 2/8 → 4/8 — correction prioritization helps on repeat fault patterns already overridden. New fault classes (NIC, power) still at 0/4.
